basic_details.job_title: NHAI Deputy Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) Deputy Manager (Information Technology) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website nhai.gov.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NHAI Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years; OBC: 3 years; PwBD: 10-15 years; Ex-servicemen: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science or Information Technology or Electronics and Communication or Masters in Computer Application (MCA) from a recognised University or Institute
qualification.details: Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science or Information Technology or Electronics and Communication or Masters in Computer Application (MCA) from a recognised University or Institute.

selection_process: GATE 2026 score in Computer Science and Information Technology Screening Committee verification of score cards Selection Committee final selection
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHAI Deputy Manager (Information Technology) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NHAI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NHAI Deputy Manager (Information Technology) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: GATE 2026 score in Computer Science and Information Technology Screening Committee verification of score cards Selection Committee final selection

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHAI Deputy Manager (Information Technology) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NHAI Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the online application is 05 August 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Deputy Manager (IT) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Engineering or Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Electronics and Communication, or a Master's in Computer Application (MCA) from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Deputy Manager (Information Technology) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for NHAI Deputy Manager (IT) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Deputy Manager (IT) position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves using the GATE 2026 score in Computer Science and Information Technology, followed by screening committee verification and final selection by the selection committee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Deputy Manager (IT) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 56100 to Rs. 177500 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Manager (IT) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Deputy Manager (Information Technology) post in the National Highways Authority of India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for NHAI Deputy Manager (IT) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out and submit the application form through the official NHAI website.

faq.question: Q9. When does the online application process begin?
faq.answer: The online application process for the NHAI Deputy Manager (Information Technology) Recruitment 2026 starts on 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
